name: Soft Router (Auto-switch)
description: Soft routing with rule engine: can switch execution model via before_agent_start (configurable).

enabled.description: Master switch. When false, the plugin does nothing (fail-open).

logDir.description: Log directory. If empty, plugin auto-derives: %USERPROFILE%/.openclaw/logs

previewChars.description: Max chars for contentPreview. 0 disables preview logging.

maxBytes.description: Rotate current log when it grows beyond this size (bytes). 0 disables rotation.

rotateCount.description: How many rotated files to keep: .1 .. .N. 0 disables keeping rotated logs.

availabilityEnabled.description: When true, emit suggestion.availability (still suggest-only; never switches models).

availabilityMode.description: static: local heuristics only (no CLI calls). cli: use cached `openclaw models status --json` to estimate auth status.

availabilityTtlMs.description: Cache TTL for availability (ms). Used in cli mode; also throttles work in static mode.

availabilityCmdTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for the CLI probe in cli mode (ms). Note: `openclaw models status --json` may take several seconds on Windows; set accordingly.

availabilityAsyncEnabled.description: When true, refresh availability auth cache in the background (message_received never blocks on CLI).

availabilityMaxStaleMs.description: Maximum age (ms) to keep using stale cached auth when refresh fails. 0 means never use stale cache when expired.

echoEnabled.description: When true, append router suggestion feedback to outgoing replies (still suggest-only).

echoWhen.description: When to echo: always / only when availability.auth=expired / never.

echoMaxChars.description: Max chars of the echoed footer text.

ruleEngineEnabled.description: When true, pick suggestion.model by explicit per-kind priority list (still suggest-only unless switchingEnabled=true).

switchingEnabled.description: When true, the plugin may return modelOverride in before_agent_start to actually switch the model for this run.

switchingMinConfidence.description: Only switch when suggestion.confidence >= this threshold.

switchingAllowChat.description: If false, never switch for kind=chat.

modelTagsPath.description: Path to model-tags.json. If empty, plugin auto-derives under %USERPROFILE%/.openclaw/workspace/tools/soft-router-suggest/

routerRulesPath.description: Path to router-rules.json. If empty, plugin auto-derives under %USERPROFILE%/.openclaw/workspace/tools/soft-router-suggest/

modelPriorityPath.description: Path to model-priority.json. If empty, plugin auto-derives under %USERPROFILE%/.openclaw/workspace/tools/soft-router-suggest/

catalogTtlMs.description: TTL for cached `openclaw models list --json` catalog (ms).

setupPromptEnabled.description: When true, echo a short setup prompt when new models are missing tags.

setupPromptMaxModels.description: Max missing-tag models to mention in the setup prompt footer.

routerLlmEnabled.description: (Experimental) When true, attempt to use a Router LLM to pick the best execution model. If unavailable or low-confidence, fall back to the rule engine. NOTE: This build includes scaffolding only unless the runtime exposes an internal model-call API.

routerLlmModelFallbacks.description: Router LLM fallback chain (first available is used) for routing decisions.

routerLlmTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for Router LLM decision call (ms).

routerLlmMinConfidence.description: Only accept Router LLM decisions at or above this confidence; otherwise fall back to rule engine.

routerLlmEndpoint.description: Local sidecar endpoint for Router LLM decisions (Option 1).

featureLoggingEnabled.description: When true, log extracted routing features (keyword hits, hasImage, hasCodeBlock, length buckets) into jsonl for observability.

openclawCliPath.description: (Portability) Override the OpenClaw CLI path used by this plugin when spawning openclaw models ... commands. Useful for Windows Scheduled Task environments where PATH does not include the npm shim.
